# Free Demo: Fraud Prevention for Internet & Software Businesses

## Leading E-Commerce Brands Rely on Sift

Our deep investments in AI-powered user insights and a data network scoring 1 trillion events per year, and a commitment to long-term customer success empower more than 700 customers to grow fearlessly.
